title: Bridge Essay: Enhancing Agency in Posttraumatic Stress Disorder Therapies Through Sensorimotor

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Mind as Computer Critique** with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Scientific evidence against computationalism — cognition is embodied, embedded, enactive, extended.

**Enhancing Agency in Posttraumatic Stress Disorder Therapies Through Sensorimotor Technologies.**. Journal of medical Internet research.. PMID: 38742989. DOI: 10.2196/58390. Posttraumatic stress disorder (PTSD) is asignificant public health concern, with only athird of patients recovering within ayear of treatment. While PTSD often disrupts the sense of body ownership and sense of agency (SA), attention to the SA in trauma has been lacking. This perspective paper explores the loss of the SA in PTSD and its relevance in the development of symptoms.
